FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.26sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f8fe63fca90>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-06-02T18:01:05Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-06-02T17:59:33Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-06-02T18:01:05Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-06-02T17:59:33Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/06/02 18:02:25.758359024 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758365762 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758402533 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758403472 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress, timestamp, producer, author)
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758421059 {
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758422023 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758432422 new <- list()
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758433283 if (!missing(width))
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758444250 new$width <- width
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758444949 if (!missing(height))
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758456288 new$height <- height
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758457783 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758472743 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758473602 if (!missing(title))
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758484970 new$title <- title
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758485603 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758496407 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758497291 if (!missing(version))
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758508021 new$version <- version
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758508691 if (!missing(paper))
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758520130 new$paper <- paper
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758520765 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758551335 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758553602 if (!missing(bg))
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758568407 new$bg <- bg
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758569141 if (!missing(fg))
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758579300 new$fg <- fg
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758580196 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758591514 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758592464 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758619733 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758620602 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758633441 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758634111 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758646878 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758647539 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758669026 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758670877 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758687718 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758688527 if (!missing(compress))
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758700812 new$compress <- compress
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758701562 if (!missing(timestamp))
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758712716 new$timestamp <- timestamp
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758714008 if (!missing(producer))
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758727697 new$producer <- producer
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758728520 if (!missing(author))
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758740469 new$author <- author
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758741215 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758756477 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758757501 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758779495 enc <- family$encoding
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758780319 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758794677 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758795456 "default"))
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758809359 old$encoding <- enc
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758810053 family <- family$metrics
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758821410 }
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758822870 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758841008 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758841966 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758855694 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758856506 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758876627 }
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758877507 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758889635 }
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758890791 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758902452 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758903223 if (is.null(pf))
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758916423 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758917249 domain = NA)
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758932069 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758932857 }
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758943542 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758944215 old$family <- family
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758955711 }
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758956505 version <- old$version
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758982776 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758983781 "2.0")
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758998790 if (version %in% versions)
2026/06/02 18:02:25.758999637 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/06/02 18:02:25.759012856 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/06/02 18:02:25.759013639 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/06/02 18:02:25.759024667 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/06/02 18:02:25.759025876 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/06/02 18:02:25.759040325 domain = NA)
2026/06/02 18:02:25.759041146 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/06/02 18:02:25.759055242 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/06/02 18:02:25.759056094 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/06/02 18:02:25.759079130 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/06/02 18:02:25.759079903 old$fillOddEven, old$compress, old$timestamp, old$producer,
2026/06/02 18:02:25.759100769 old$author)
2026/06/02 18:02:25.759101331 invisible()
2026/06/02 18:02:25.759110179 }
